mapper.select:
SELECT sp.id, sp.story_id AS storyId, sp.content, sp.image_url AS imageUrl, sp.author_id AS authorId, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, sp.pen_name AS penName, sp.sequence, sp.like_count AS likeCount, sp.is_hot AS isHot, sp.is_key_point AS isKeyPoint, sp.parent_id AS parentId, sp.branch_name AS branchName, sp.create_time AS createTime, sp.is_ai_assisted AS isAiAssisted,
CASE WHEN pl.id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isLikedByMe
FALSE AS isLikedByMe
FROM story_paragraph sp LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON sp.author_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN paragraph_like pl ON sp.id = pl.paragraph_id AND pl.user_id = #{userId}
WHERE sp.story_id = #{storyId} ORDER BY sp.sequence ASC

SELECT sp.id, sp.story_id AS storyId, sp.content, sp.image_url AS imageUrl, sp.author_id AS authorId, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, sp.pen_name AS penName, sp.sequence, sp.like_count AS likeCount, sp.is_hot AS isHot, sp.is_key_point AS isKeyPoint, sp.parent_id AS parentId, sp.branch_name AS branchName, sp.create_time AS createTime, sp.is_ai_assisted AS isAiAssisted, s.title AS storyTitle FROM story_paragraph sp LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON sp.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN story s ON sp.story_id = s.id WHERE sp.author_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sp.create_time DESC
SELECT author_id FROM story_paragraph WHERE story_id = #{storyId} ORDER BY sequence DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT create_time FROM story_paragraph WHERE story_id = #{storyId} AND author_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sequence), 0) FROM story_paragraph WHERE story_id = #{storyId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM story_paragraph WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author_id) FROM story_paragraph WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
